description_long: This object consists of a linear arrangement of multiple small shrubs, each with a distinct cluster of green leaves and varying heights and densities. The foliage appears lush and healthy, with some shrubs displaying broader leaves while others have more slender, pointed foliage. The plants are spaced closely together, suggesting a curated or landscaped grouping, typical of urban green spaces or decorative borders. The coloration ranges from deep green to lighter, yellowish-green tones, with some subtle variation in leaf shape and size. No flowers are visible, and the overall structure is low to the ground, with a bushy, compact habit. The grouping is well-suited for use in urban planters, sidewalk edges, or small park beds.
description: A row of small, bushy green shrubs with varied leaf shapes and dense foliage, arranged in a landscaped grouping. The plants are compact and low to the ground, ideal for urban decorative use.
description_view_0: A frontal view showing the full row of shrubs, highlighting the diversity in leaf shapes and the dense, bushy arrangement.
description_view_1: A side view emphasizing the vertical profile and the close spacing of the shrubs, with foliage appearing more layered.
description_view_2: A rear view displaying the backs of the shrubs, with leaf density and plant outlines visible against the light background.
description_view_3: An alternate side view showing the vertical alignment and the variation in shrub heights and leaf spread.
